description_long: This object is a grouped set of common hardware store cleaning and maintenance tools, including a metal step ladder, two brooms with wooden handles, a red plunger, two buckets (one blue and one gray), three bottles or cans (likely for cleaning fluids or paint), and a large red fire extinguisher with a black hose. The step ladder is the tallest item, constructed from metal with teal-colored steps and handrails. The brooms have wide, flat heads and long wooden handles, while the plunger features a classic rubber cup and wooden shaft. The buckets are cylindrical and appear to be made of plastic or metal, suitable for carrying liquids. The fire extinguisher is robust, with a visible hose and nozzle, and the bottles/cans are arranged upright, suggesting storage or display. The collection is typical of what might be found in a hardware store's cleaning supplies section or utility area.
description: A collection of hardware store cleaning and maintenance tools, including a metal step ladder, brooms, buckets, bottles, a plunger, and a fire extinguisher.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full set: step ladder, two brooms, plunger, two buckets, three bottles/cans, and a fire extinguisher all clearly visible and arranged in a row.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back of the step ladder and the clustered arrangement of the tools behind it, with the fire extinguisher and brooms partially obscured.
description_view_2: Frontal angled view with the step ladder facing forward, the fire extinguisher and buckets visible underneath, and the brooms and plunger to the right.
description_view_3: Side/rear view focusing on the side of the step ladder, with the brooms, plunger, and buckets more prominent and the fire extinguisher partially hidden.
attribute_storefront_layout: The objects are arranged in a compact group with the step ladder centrally positioned and other tools clustered around its base, resembling a display or storage area.
